description_long: This is a matte black SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles. The body features flat panels, minimal ornamentation, and pronounced wheel arches, giving it a rugged and functional appearance. The front end is equipped with two round headlights, a simple grille, and a flat hood, while the rear is squared off with a visible spare tire mounted on the back door. The side profile reveals four doors, flush windows, and robust tires suitable for urban and off-road environments. The wheels are large with thick, all-terrain tires and simple, utilitarian rims. The overall aesthetic suggests durability and practicality, ideal for both city streets and rougher terrain.
description: A matte black, boxy SUV with four doors, round headlights, and rugged all-terrain tires, designed for both urban and off-road use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat hood, two round headlights, and a simple grille.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying four doors, flush windows, and large rugged tires.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the spare tire mounted on the back door and squared-off rear design.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing four doors and robust tires.
attribute_wheel_design: simple, utilitarian rims with a solid center and thick all-terrain tires
